description: Every FINRA Query API dataset, plus local trend detection and batch registration checks no other FINRA tool offers.

tools.name: async_get
tools.description: Poll the status and results of an async data request. Required: group, name, requestId. Returns the DatasetRecord.

params.name: group
params.description: Dataset group

params.name: name
params.description: Dataset name within the group

params.name: requestId
params.description: Async request ID returned when the job was submitted

tools.name: catalog_list
tools.description: List all available datasets, optionally filtered by group or name. Optional: group, name. Returns array of Dataset.

params.name: group
params.description: Filter by dataset group (e.g. OTCMarket, FixedIncomeMarket, firm, registration, finra)

params.name: name
params.description: Filter by dataset name within a group

tools.name: data_get
tools.description: Get a single dataset record by its primary ID (only for datasets where supportsGetById is true — check via 'catalog list'). Required: group, name, id. Returns the DatasetRecord.

params.name: group
params.description: Dataset group

params.name: name
params.description: Dataset name within the group

params.name: id
params.description: Primary ID of the record (e.g. CRD number for registration datasets)

tools.name: data_list
tools.description: List/filter dataset records via query parameters. Required: group, name. Optional: fields, sort, offset (default: 0) (plus 3 more). Returns array of DatasetRecord.

params.name: group
params.description: Dataset group (e.g. OTCMarket, FixedIncomeMarket, firm, registration, finra) — confirm exact casing via 'catalog list'

params.name: name
params.description: Dataset name within the group — confirm exact spelling via 'catalog list'

params.name: fields
params.description: Comma-delimited list of field names to retrieve; default is all fields

params.name: sort
params.description: Comma-delimited sort fields, prefix with - for descending. Requires an EQUAL filter on every partition field (see 'metadata get').

params.name: offset
params.description: Pagination offset (max 500000)

params.name: limit
params.description: Max records to return (sync max 5000)

params.name: delimiter
params.description: Field delimiter for text/plain responses

params.name: quote-values
params.description: Quote string values in text/plain responses

tools.name: data_query
tools.description: Filter dataset records via a JSON request body (richer filtering than 'data list'). Required: group, name. Optional: fields, compareFilters, dateRangeFilters (plus 7 more). Returns array of DatasetRecord.

params.name: group
params.description: Dataset group

params.name: name
params.description: Dataset name within the group

params.name: fields
params.description: Field names to retrieve; default is all fields

params.name: compareFilters
params.description: JSON array of {fieldName, fieldValue, compareType} objects. compareType is one of EQUAL, NOT_EQUAL, GREATER, LESSER, GTE, LTE.

params.name: dateRangeFilters
params.description: JSON array of {fieldName, startDate, endDate} objects. Dates are YYYY-MM-DD or YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm:ss.SSS.

params.name: domainFilters
params.description: JSON array of {fieldName, values: [...]} objects

params.name: orFilters
params.description: JSON array of OR-grouped compareFilters/domainFilters objects

params.name: sortFields
params.description: Sort fields, prefix with - for descending. Requires an EQUAL compareFilter on every partition field.

params.name: limit
params.description: Max records to return (sync max 5000, async max 100000)

params.name: offset
params.description: Pagination offset (max 500000 sync)

params.name: quoteValues
params.description: Quote string values in text/plain responses

params.name: async
params.description: Run as an async job for bulk extracts (>5000 records); poll via 'async get'

tools.name: metadata_get
tools.description: Get field list, types, and partition fields for a dataset. Required: group, name. Returns the DatasetMetaData.

params.name: group
params.description: Dataset group (e.g. OTCMarket, FixedIncomeMarket, firm, registration, finra)

params.name: name
params.description: Dataset name within the group

tools.name: partitions_list
tools.description: List available partition values for a dataset, used for incremental sync. Required: group, name. Returns the PartitionAvailabilityResponse.

params.name: group
params.description: Dataset group

params.name: name
params.description: Dataset name within the group
